seedanceSegments.title: Hook chips + taco sear ignition
seedanceSegments.description: Brittle tortilla chip fracture ASMR widening into sour cream tease plus ground beef drop and crumble sear beginning.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide only as structural Licorn kitchen continuity anchor (never forces wide-camera framing alone). Use @KitchenIslandOverhead only as primary overhead terrazzo board identity for macros. Use @InductionWide only as flush black Licorn induction plate geometry under skillet. Use @CharacterSheet only as Licorn mascot body proportions silhouette. Use @PoseTopDown only as top-down authoritative hand kinematics posture. Use @SiliconeSpatula only as flexible French maryse (silicone bowl spatula) blade for crumble break-up and scraping sauté-pan walls per utensil-task-mapping—never use @TurningSpatula for these fold/scrape motions in this skillet beat.  Scale lock: broken chips remain normal snack crumbs (palm-sized cluster max), negatives: NOT oversized diner nacho slabs, NOT miniature novelty chip dust. Taco beef crumble reads as skillet-depth thin browning blanket, NOT meatballs, NOT sloppy joe swamp. Generate exactly 9 rapid shots using HARD CUTS only, aggregated duration target 5 seconds, NO slow motion gimmicks, NO lens morph transitions, NO bonus shots invention. TikTok vertical food cinematography vibe 1080:1920, seedance2 References mode fidelity. Integrated audible design: ZERO speech; ZERO VO; ZERO music scoring — strictly diegetic tantalizing tactile kitchen acoustics snapping to edits. Operational negatives recap: disallow tutorial typography, social UI logos, nori sushi variant divergence, flaming torch absurdities, phantom extra hands. Maintain Licorn invariant surfaces: luminous terrazzo island AND flush black slab induction silhouette continuous. Operator note: replicate each preceding @ reference line into Seedance References UI verbatim roles when attaching PNGs manually. Mandatory granular timing choreography: 0.0-0.8s: brittle chip shards explode macro; 0.8-1.7s: chips sidle whipped sour cream teaser; 1.7-2.9s: raw beef snowfall into screaming hot pan; 2.9-4.2s: flexible maryse avalanche smashing clumps steaming; 4.2-5.0s: pan tilt skim removing liquid fat blink

seedanceSegments.title: Tri-stack fold compaction TikTok mechanic
seedanceSegments.description: Demonstrates quadrant-over-quadrant compression without burrito cylinder morph.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenLayoutContextWide only as structural kitchen anchor. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead only as overhead geometric fold readability. Finger pressure ONLY — NO napkins clutching greasy heat externally yet. Generate exactly 9 rapid shots using HARD CUTS only, aggregated duration target 6 seconds, NO slow motion gimmicks, NO lens morph transitions, NO bonus shots invention.
